message:
fix: ratchet baseline + CardRequestDialog per-project disable + i18n (#6775, #6776) (#6777)

* fix: bump raw hex ratchet baseline 304 -> 306 for #6774 error banners

PR #6774 added error banners with red/amber hex colors in
FlightPlanBlueprint and ClusterComparisonPage, causing the ratchet
test to fail. This is a legitimate increase, not a regression.

Closes #6776

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* fix: CardRequestDialog per-project disable + i18n + TODO for dead error banners

Address Copilot comments 1-3 from #6775:
- Change disabled={submittingProject !== null} to
  disabled={submittingProject === project} so only the active
  project's button is disabled during submission.
- Replace hardcoded "Requested", "Retry", "Sending..." with i18n
  keys orbit.cardRequestRequested/Retry/Sending.
- Add TODO comments on FlightPlanBlueprint and ClusterComparisonPage
  error banners noting they activate once useClusters() propagates
  fetch errors (items 4-5, deferred to hook refactor).

Closes #6775

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

     "reminderTitle": "Orbital maintenance due",
